Findings.Title: Falco rule 'Terminal shell in container' fired
Findings.Detail: Falco detected /bin/sh exec inside pod contoso-api-7d9f in namespace prod.
Findings.Remediation: Investigate; restrict kubectl exec via OPA policy.

Findings.Title: Falco rule 'Write below etc' fired
Findings.Detail: Pod write to /etc/passwd detected in worker-2.
Findings.Remediation: Quarantine pod and review image provenance.

Findings.Title: Falco rule set up to date
